description: This Dart source file defines the 'RootShellScreen' widget for a Flutter application, managing navigation, role-based UI components, and routing in the Smart Outage platform's frontend.

classes.name: RootShellScreen
classes.description: Main scaffold widget that includes a drawer, app title, and actions.

classes.name: _RoleHome
classes.description: Stateful widget managing role-based navigation tabs.

classes.name: _RoleHomeState
classes.description: State class for '_RoleHome', handling tab index and role changes.

classes.name: _NavShortcut
classes.description: Widget for immediate navigation to a specified route upon mounting.

classes.name: _RoleDrawer
classes.description: Drawer widget allowing role selection with options for Operator, Crew, and Customer.

classes.name: _RoleOption
classes.description: UI component representing a role selection item.

classes.name: _NotificationsAction
classes.description: AppBar icon button for notifications with badge indicator.

classes.name: _SettingsAction
classes.description: AppBar icon button for navigating to settings.

methods.name: build
methods.description: Build method for 'RootShellScreen', assembling the scaffold.

methods.name: _pagesForRole
methods.description: Returns list of page widgets based on user role.

methods.name: _navItemsForRole
methods.description: Returns navigation bar destinations based on role.

methods.name: _NavShortcut
methods.description: Build method triggers navigation to route on first build.

methods.name: _RoleDrawer
methods.description: Builds the drawer with role options.

methods.name: _RoleOption
methods.description: Creates a selectable role option widget.

methods.name: _NotificationsAction
methods.description: Builds notification icon with unread count badge.
